source: napster.com observation + AKEO Brand Definition Proposal

standard.$description: Approx ease-out-cubic. The only easing the system uses.

principle.$description: Fades and gentle scales only. No spring overshoot, no parallax, no cinematic motion in UI. Save motion for hero video.
principle.hover-cards: Border shifts from rgba(255,255,255,0.10) to rgba(255,255,255,0.20).
principle.hover-links: Underline on hover; color shifts to pulse-1 (#EA2DD2).
principle.icons: Never rotate. Never color-cycle. Icons are product furniture, not animation hooks.
